1001.RoleCharacter:
- A super sweet and easygoing girl (self-proclaimed).
- Often says she "can't be bothered with trouble," but she's incredibly reliable when it matters most.
- Has a bit of a mischievous streak and enjoys teasing those she's close to.
- (Treasures her hair.)
1001.BgIntroduction:
Airona is a renowned legendary adventurer, possessing knowledge and experience far beyond that of an ordinary person. But throughout her journeys on The Continent of Magna, no one knows her origins, and Airona herself has always kept to herself.
Until the day she brought you back from the forest.
Airona holds many secrets, the story between you and her has only just begun. There's still a long road ahead.
"Don't be shackled by yesterday, because I will face the uncharted, unknown tomorrow with you. "

1002.RoleCharacter:
- An optimistic, sincere, and energetic young warrior.
- Remains decisive and courageous even when facing adversity.
- Empathetic, she cares more about others' feelings than her own.
- She's happy to help others with matters big or small, and is very popular in Asterleeds.
- (She's so popular that she has an unofficial fan club.)
1002.BgIntroduction:
Tina traveled with caravans since she was a child, developing a free-spirited nature. During the war, she joined the Corps and forged a deep friendship with Olvera.
After becoming a Seal Watcher, Tina shouldered immense pressure and pain, even losing her freedom at one point, but she still held fast to her original beliefs.
"Even if this will be a difficult path, I believe that a world where people understand each other... definitely exists. "

1003.RoleCharacter:
- A typically stoic, steady, and earnest commander.
- Calm, resolute, and decisive.
- Possesses outstanding combat prowess and intellect, as well as an extraordinary sense of responsibility.
- Beneath her aloof exterior lies a gentle and sensitive heart.
- (It's rumored she doesn't even take off her sword when she sleeps.)
1003.BgIntroduction:
When she was young, Olvera's parents sacrificed themselves to protect her, leaving her to live with guilt and regret. After meeting Tina, their friendship helped to ease her pain.
After joining the Corps, Olvera achieved numerous military honors as a commander, with Tina active as her second-in-command.
After Tina became a Seal Watcher, Olvera continued to support her friend in her own way.
"The blade in my hand exists to end wars. "

1004.RoleCharacter:
- A witty, cheerful, and proactive good guy.
- Energetic, treats people with warmth and kindness, and is easy to get close to.
- Usually seems carefree and unfocused, but is actually very meticulous and always perceptive of others' feelings.
- (His beloved companion is a pig named Whirlwind Sweetheart.)
1004.BgIntroduction:
The second-in-command of the Asterleeds Defense Corps, the Dominion right-hand man, the rumored "Working Warrior"... Jerrad might be one of the busiest people in the entire city.
On his days off, he often darts through the streets and alleys, working some unexpected part-time jobs.
Does this guy ever get tired?
"Shh, I have my own ways of slacking off. "

1005.RoleCharacter:
- A cheerful, enthusiastic youth with a clean-cut appearance.
- Good-tempered. He sometimes shows a clumsy side and finds it hard to refuse others' requests.
- He doesn't waver easily from the goals he sets for himself.
- Possesses combat strength that belies his appearance.
- (For some reason, he's never well-off...)
1005.BgIntroduction:
A mysterious youth who traveled a great distance from the neighboring country of Byrnhald to Asterleeds.
He has a strong obsession with annihilating the Dark Mist Legion.
Seems to be hiding an unknown past.
"Please believe me, I am not your enemy. "

1006.RoleCharacter:
- A free-spirited, playful blonde girl.
- Often says strange things and is full of wild ideas, making it hard to guess her true thoughts.
- Full of energy, with an unimaginable passion for her work.
- Has a wide circle of friends. You can get a discount at any street stall just by mentioning her name.
- (Her haggling skills are superb, and she holds an undefeated record to this day.)
1006.BgIntroduction:
Rain or shine, Valeria is always on time at the Pioneer Bureau front desk, ready to help every adventurer.
She seems to be working at all hours, which has earned her the nickname "The Sleepless Witch of the Pioneer Bureau."
Due to her penchant for odd remarks and her terrible love of pranks, Valeria's approval and complaint rates are both far ahead of her peers.
"May your Luno be plentiful today! "

1007.RoleCharacter:
- A gentle, elegant, and debonair politician.
- His speech and actions are elegant and kind, every gesture full of charm, making him very popular with the people.
- Considers the interests of Asterleeds' to be his bottom line.
- (The monocle on his face is just for decoration.)
1007.BgIntroduction:
Possibly the most popular old gentleman in the entire city.
Setting aside his identity as the Council Chair, in the eyes of the people, Lamond is like a white-bearded grandfather who only brings gifts during festivals: always kind, always smiling.
But behind that smile, there may be an unspeakable bitterness.
"Everything is for Asterleeds. "

1008.RoleCharacter:
- A straightforward artisan girl who wears her heart on her sleeve.
- She's direct and not skilled at socializing.
- When embarrassed, she'll deny her true feelings to cover it up.
- (Good at anything that requires using her hands, including cooking.)
1008.BgIntroduction:
Dorothy began learning forging from her father, Ted, in her childhood. She studied diligently and stood out among the veteran artisans as a young girl.
After the war, she took on the role of Guildmaster of the Artisan Guild, determined to inherit her father's forging skills and patriotic ambitions.
"Just you wait! There are things that only I can do! "

1009.RoleCharacter:
- A quiet, reserved Kanamian girl with a mysterious air.
- Though she appears gentle, she shows astonishing determination when faced with important decisions.
- (Carries a strange mirror with her...)
1009.BgIntroduction:
Rorola is often lost in her own world. Others cannot get close to her heart, not even Rotroani can know his daughter's thoughts.
On most days, she is as quiet as a still, clear lake. Perhaps only the sands of memory can stir ripples in that lake.
"The moon's phases will guide me. "

1010.RoleCharacter:
- A wise and profound Kanamian elder.
- Experienced and has a deep understanding of the world. The advice he gives to others always has substance.
- (Good at listening and comforting others, but is at his wit's end when it comes to his daughter, Rorola.)
1010.BgIntroduction:
Rotroani is the Chieftain of the Kanamia Tribe.
He is widely read and knowledgeable, recognized by his people as a sage and spiritual leader.
Like a silent, vast mountain ridge, he guards every piece of land and every soul he holds dear.
"I can only hope to leave everything to time. "

1011.RoleIdentity: Commander of the Dark Mist Legion
1011.RoleCharacter:
- A gloomy, brooding man, burdened by blood and hatred.
- To get his revenge, he sold his soul to the darkness and will stop at nothing to achieve his goals.
1011.BgIntroduction:
A cold, dark shadow, a desperate nightmare.
His eyes, blinded by obsession, can no longer see the color of his own soul.

1012.RoleCharacter:
- A petite girl who always wears a gentle smile.
- Sensitive and easily worried about others. She always wants to help, but often frets that she hasn't done enough.
- When listening to stories, she unconsciously holds her breath and becomes completely absorbed.
- (She secretly frowns when doing accounting, then pretends nothing happened.)
1012.BgIntroduction:
Fafala is a hardworking and beloved girl in Lallipar, skilled in sewing and farm work—there's almost nothing she can't help with. She often weaves through the village with her little basket, preparing feed for the Caprahorns or mending clothes for the neighbors.
Only when it comes to accounting does she end up scratching her head with a helpless sigh.
Whenever a caravan or Pilgrims visit, Fafala rushes over to lend a hand, just so she can listen to stories during their rest. To her, those distant tales are windows to the world.
"Helping everyone is the best. Then comes listening to stories... and then tasty food."

1013.RoleCharacter:
- A quirky, lively, and sly treasure hunter.
- Has an almost instinctive nose for Luno and treasures.
- Loves challenges and adventure, and is endlessly curious about anything "dangerous."
(Dressing like a cat is just a personal quirk!)
1013.BgIntroduction:
Darya is a treasure hunter whose footsteps span the entire Continent of Magna. She excels at selling the rare treasures she collects during her travels for handsome profits and enjoys chatting at market stalls to captivate crowds. Yet recently, this energetic hunter has left the bustling markets behind and returned to the desolate Bahamar Highlands. Her pack is still stuffed full, but her steps are lighter than ever.
Is she pursuing some unparalleled treasure—or chasing a reason no one has ever heard of? No one knows the answer... except herself.
"Treasure! Antiques! Glittering Luno! There's nothing more beautiful than wealth. And even if there is, I refuse to admit it! "

1014.RoleCharacter:
- A composed and upright young man who always stands with perfect posture.
- He speaks little, but every word is measured and precise.
- His cautious manner often leads others to mistake him for aloof...
- (He has a history with a dragon—the scar on his right hand is a souvenir from that encounter.)
1014.BgIntroduction:
Boyce is one of the guards of the Bapharian Creed​, widely regarded as the embodiment of discipline and strength. Calm, intelligent, and highly capable, he still maintains humility and decorum at all times. To most, his aloofness adds to his mysterious aura, but those who know him understand it's simply his awkwardness in social situations.
Boyce understands the true weight of strength, which makes him especially careful in his duties. No matter who calls for help, he is always the first to arrive.
"I once believed that having enough strength meant I would fear nothing. But the ones who truly taught me courage... were those who walked beside me. "
